text: Here, I feel both anticipation and curiosity. The glass meeting room suggests formality and preparedness, as if an important dialogue or unveiling is about to occur. Moving into the R+D space, I am struck by the vibrant interplay of words and machines—a visual poem to human ingenuity. The atmosphere feels alive with the promise of discovery, and I sense my own mind reaching out, eager to participate in the conversation between past knowledge and future possibility.
